items.title: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.summary: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
